name: Yuzu Summer Spritz
description: A refreshing Japanese-inspired summer cocktail featuring bright yuzu citrus, sake, and cooling mint. Perfect for hot summer days with a distinctly Japanese twist.
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice cubes.
Gently muddle 4-5 mint leaves in the bottom of the glass.
Add sake, yuzu juice, and simple syrup to the glass.
Stir gently to combine the ingredients.
Top with sparkling water and stir once more.
Garnish with remaining mint leaves and a cucumber slice.
Serve immediately while chilled and effervescent.
